text.title: array-items-wrapper-extraction Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for array-items-wrapper-extraction as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Asking for "extract all entities" and accepting the model's reply as either a dict (single entity) or a list (many entities).
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: The same prompt yields different top-level shapes depending on how many entities the model thinks it found. Production code ends up branching on isinstance(result, list) everywhere — a known source of crashes when an empty result returns null or {}.
